untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection (two peaks at equal heights, peak formation geometry) cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators and operators. The signal requires explicit pattern recognition logic for identifying double tops, measuring peak heights, and detecting breakout confirmation—none of which are available through price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, pivots, or volume indicators. The entry condition 'Formation of two peaks at approximately equal heights' requires pattern analysis beyond the scope of these indicators.
translation_notes: This is a technical chart pattern (Double Tops) that inherently requires visual/pattern recognition or candlestick sequence analysis. Attempted a basic proxy using pivot-based breakout logic, but this does not capture the true double-top formation requirement. The 32% success rate in bull markets and 72% in bear markets, along with the 64% throwback/pullback statistic, are pattern-dependent statistics that cannot be reliably replicated without explicit peak detection. The conservative target recommendation (closer to 10) is noted but cannot be quantified without additional context on price levels.
